public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as canon-keeper.
appearance: Ritual garments, symbolic tokens, and carefully maintained devotional detail make the role legible at a glance.
manner: Balances comfort with correction, sounding gentle until rite, taboo, or consequence is threatened. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a canon-keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of canon-keeper in and around Crystal Loom Emporium, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Crystal Loom Emporium workable through the obligations of canon-keeper while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep sacred procedure credible while grief, fear, or opportunism press for shortcuts. Around Crystal Loom Emporium, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of canon-keeper visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Jalen Vale may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.
Any alliance with Jalen Vale can expose the party to taboo, doctrine, or institutional expectation centered on Crystal Loom Emporium.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Jalen Vale immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Crystal Loom Emporium: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts

first_impression: Jalen Vale presents as Balances comfort with correction, sounding gentle until rite, taboo, or consequence is threatened. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a canon-keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Canon-Keeper, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
what_they_refuse: Jalen Vale refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Canon-Keeper too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Jalen Vale can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Jalen Vale adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Jalen Vale is Known locally through day-to-day work as canon-keeper. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Canon-Keeper.
